minimum_subject_rule: Subject must identify one source record and its bounded locator/title context.
minimum_process_fields: envelope_id; generated_at; lane_id; run_id; action; subject_ref; assertions; claim_scope; non_claims
minimum_evidence_rule: At least one input or output object with locator/hash/provenance context.
action_specific_fields: Prefer captured_at; source_family; language; jurisdiction; rights_notes.
strongest_allowed_statement_now: LIMEN observed or retrieved one identified public source at a stated time and bound it to process metadata.
blocked_overread: Do not treat observation as proof that the source allegation is true, legally valid, safe, or complete.
paper_thesis_use: Methods/process diagram; source-capture appendix; thesis provenance subsection

minimum_subject_rule: Subject must remain a source-linked record rather than silently becoming a case-level truth claim.
minimum_process_fields: envelope_id; generated_at; lane_id; run_id; action; subject_ref; assertions; claim_scope; non_claims
minimum_evidence_rule: At least one input or output object with distinct normalized/output hashes when applicable.
strongest_allowed_statement_now: LIMEN normalized or extracted stated fields from identified public material and emitted a traceable derived record.
blocked_overread: Do not treat extraction as validation of allegation truth, legal meaning, or final policy interpretation.
paper_thesis_use: Extraction-method note; reproducibility appendix; thesis workflow figure

minimum_subject_rule: Subject must be a case record or crosswalk row, not a generic source or artifact badge.
minimum_process_fields: envelope_id; generated_at; lane_id; run_id; action; subject_ref; assertions; claim_scope; non_claims
minimum_evidence_rule: At least one input or output object linking the assignment to prior case/source material.
action_specific_fields: Prefer evidence_tier or taxonomy/crosswalk assignment assertions; schema_refs; tooling.
strongest_allowed_statement_now: LIMEN assigned a bounded taxonomy, evidence-tier, or cross-framework label from stated inputs.
blocked_overread: Do not treat classification as proof of substantive harm, legality, compliance, or official status.
paper_thesis_use: Taxonomy methods table; crosswalk appendix; thesis claim-support map

minimum_subject_rule: Subject must be a case record or crosswalk row under explicit review rather than an implied final merits judgment.
minimum_process_fields: envelope_id; generated_at; lane_id; run_id; action; subject_ref; assertions; claim_scope; non_claims; review_status; review_notes
minimum_evidence_rule: At least one input or output object tied to the reviewed record or review artifact.
action_specific_fields: Explicit review_status plus one or more review_notes are required.
strongest_allowed_statement_now: LIMEN recorded a bounded reviewer or lane appraisal about completeness, narrowing, caution, or revision needs.
blocked_overread: Do not present review as legal determination, safety certification, or factual adjudication.
paper_thesis_use: Reviewer-response memo; limitations table; thesis methods/control section

minimum_subject_rule: Subject must identify a duplicate cluster or tightly bounded related-case grouping event.
minimum_process_fields: envelope_id; generated_at; lane_id; run_id; action; subject_ref; assertions; claim_scope; non_claims
minimum_evidence_rule: At least one input or output object linking the grouping to prior case records or cluster artifacts.
action_specific_fields: Prefer explicit cluster membership/revision assertions and cluster artifact outputs.
strongest_allowed_statement_now: LIMEN grouped records as duplicates or tightly related cases for atlas processing purposes.
blocked_overread: Do not treat clustering as proof that separate allegations are true, legally identical, or fully merged in substance.
paper_thesis_use: Duplicate-governance appendix; dashboard methods note; thesis cluster figure

minimum_subject_rule: Subject must identify a derived artifact rather than the incident itself.
minimum_process_fields: envelope_id; generated_at; lane_id; run_id; action; subject_ref; assertions; claim_scope; non_claims
minimum_evidence_rule: At least one output artifact is required; publication receipts must bind emitted files/manifests rather than remain input-only.
action_specific_fields: Prefer dashboard_hooks; artifact hashes; publication bundle locators; transparency/vc/signature placeholders only when honestly populated.
strongest_allowed_statement_now: LIMEN emitted one traceable table, figure input, manuscript-support artifact, or local publication bundle from stated inputs.
blocked_overread: Do not present publication as external witnessing, detached-signature authenticity, truth, legality, compliance, certification, or safety proof unless a stronger witness is actually present.
paper_thesis_use: Methods companion note; appendix bundle table; thesis artifact register

minimum_subject_rule: Subject must identify the replaced artifact or case state and remain bounded to correction lineage.
minimum_process_fields: envelope_id; generated_at; lane_id; run_id; action; subject_ref; assertions; claim_scope; non_claims; supersession
minimum_evidence_rule: At least one output object should point to the replacement state or correcting artifact.
action_specific_fields: Supersession block must name prior envelope ID, superseded locator, prior hash, reason code, and replacement scope; review_notes should explain bounded correction context.
strongest_allowed_statement_now: LIMEN replaced one prior recorded artifact or case state with a traceable corrected state.
blocked_overread: Do not present supersession as proof that the replacement is substantively true in all respects, only that correction lineage is documented.
paper_thesis_use: Correction-chain appendix; reproducibility/change log; thesis evidence-governance note
